objectSets.name: First Pass - Insert/Upsert with Draft Status

objects.query: SELECT EndDate, FinancialYear, Name, StartDate, Status FROM AccountingPeriod
SELECT CompanyName, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, LegalEntityCity, LegalEntityCountry, LegalEntityPostalCode, LegalEntityState, LegalEntityStreet, Name, Status FROM LegalEntity
SELECT AccountingPeriodId, LegalEntityId, Name, Status FROM LegalEntyAccountingPeriod
SELECT Description, IsDefault, Name, Status FROM PaymentTerm
SELECT Description, PaymentTermId, PaymentTerm.Name, PaymentTimeframe, Period, PeriodUnit, Type FROM PaymentTermItem
SELECT BillingTreatmentSelection, Description, Name, Status FROM BillingPolicy

SELECT BillingPolicyId, BillingPolicy.Name, CanChangeBillingFrequency, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, IsMilestoneBilling, ExcludeFromBilling, LegalEntityId, LegalEntity.Name, Name, Status FROM BillingTreatment

SELECT BillingTreatmentId, BillingTreatment.Name, BillingTreatment.BillingPolicy.Name, BillingTreatment.LegalEntity.Name, BillingType, Controller, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, FlatAmount, MilestoneStartDateOffset, MilestoneStartDateOffsetUnit, MilestoneStartDate, MilestoneType, Name, Percentage, ProcessingOrder, Sequencing, Status, Type, Handling0Amount FROM BillingTreatmentItem
SELECT BillingPolicyId, StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT AccountingCode, AccountingName, AccountingType, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, FinancialStatement, LegalEntityId, Name, Type FROM GeneralLedgerAccount

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, FilterCriteria, FilterLogic, CreditGeneralLedgerAccountId, DebitGeneralLedgerAccountId, LegalEntityId, Name, Priority, Status, TransactionAmountField, TransactionType FROM GeneralLedgerAcctAsgntRule

SELECT CanUseAltrnPaymentMethod, CurrencyIsoCode, DefaultIntervalUnit, DefaultIntervalValue, DefaultMaximumRetryCount, DefaultRetryIntervalType, Description, IsDefaultRuleSet, Name, Status FROM PaymentRetryRuleSet

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, Description, IntervalUnit, IntervalValue, MaximumRetryCount, PaymentGatewayErrorCategory, PaymentGatewayErrorCode, PaymentGatewayId, PaymentRetryRuleSetId, PaymentRetryRuleSet.Name, RetryIntervalType FROM PaymentRetryRule
SELECT BillingTreatmentId, BillingTreatment.Name, BillingTreatment.BillingPolicy.Name, BillingTreatment.LegalEntity.Name, Name, Status FROM BillingTreatmentItem WHERE Status = 'Draft'

objectSets.name: Third Pass - Set DefaultBillingTreatmentId on BillingPolicy

objects.query: SELECT BillingPolicyId, BillingPolicy.Name, LegalEntityId, LegalEntity.Name, Name, Status FROM BillingTreatment WHERE Status = 'Draft'
SELECT DefaultBillingTreatmentId, DefaultBillingTreatment.Name, BillingTreatmentSelection, Description, Name, Status FROM BillingPolicy WHERE Status = 'Draft'
